Package Main.ObjectInGame.Items

package Main.ObjectInGame.Items
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    Main.ObjectInGame
     
    Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly
     
    Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle
     
  • Class
    Description
    BaseItem
    Abstract base class representing an item in the game.
    BigHealingPotion
    Represents a healing item that restores a large amount of health to a Cookie.
    Chicken
    Represents a Chicken item in the game.
    ChillyBoost
    Represents a special boost item that temporarily increases game speed and grants the player temporary invincibility.
    Croissant
    Represents a Croissant item that can move with physics and provide different effects depending on its type when interacted with.
    CroissantType
    Represents the different types of Croissant items available in the game.
    HealingPotion
    Represents a healing potion item that restores a small amount of health to a Cookie when used.
    ItemView
    Represents the visual representation of an item in the game.
    Magnetic
    Represents a magnetic item that temporarily enables a magnet effect for the player.
    Pearl
    Represents a Pearl object that moves horizontally across the screen.
    SpeedBoost
    Represents a speed boost item that temporarily increases the game speed and grants the player temporary invincibility.
    StickyMochi
    Represents a StickyMochi item that provides both healing and score when collected by the player.
    Tomato
    Represents a Tomato item that restores health and gives a small score bonus when collected by the player.
    Vegetable
    Represents a Vegetable item that grants score when collected by the player.
